description_long: This is a medium-sized wooden barrel with a cylindrical body constructed from dark brown wooden staves, each showing a natural wood grain texture. The barrel is reinforced by four wide, black metal hoops that encircle its body, each fastened with prominent round rivets. The front face features a wooden end cap with a visible wood grain and a metal spigot at the bottom center, suggesting it is designed to dispense liquids. The barrel rests on two sturdy wooden supports, elevating it slightly off the ground. The overall appearance is rustic and functional, typical of barrels used for storing or dispensing beverages such as wine or beer in urban or tavern settings. No visible labels or markings are present, and there is no lid or handle attached.
description: A rustic wooden barrel with black metal hoops, a front spigot, and sturdy wooden supports, designed for liquid storage or dispensing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wooden end cap, central spigot, and the circular arrangement of metal hoops.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the cylindrical wooden body, four black metal hoops with rivets, and two wooden supports.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain wooden end cap without a spigot, framed by the metal hoops.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the hoops, rivets, and wooden supports.
